intent: Introduce authority zones for governed Octon automation so bounded internal repair can proceed only when zone, ownership, write scope, run binding, idempotency, approval, and evidence allow it.

scope.summary: Authority-zone contract, lifecycle recovery metadata, runtime dispatch enforcement, validators, generated projections, and validation receipts.

landing_evaluation.blocker_reason: Hosted branch-no-pr landing and source-branch cleanup were not attempted because the worktree contains out-of-scope blocked proposal receipts and retained runtime evidence that must not be deleted or folded into this completed authority-zone change set.

not_landed_reason: branch-local closeout only; no PR opened and no hosted main mutation attempted
not_cleaned_reason: source branch is intentionally retained as the branch-no-pr durable history while unrelated retained evidence and blocked proposal receipts remain unstaged

source_branch_cleanup.worktree: authority-zone change set staged and committed; unrelated retained evidence and blocked proposal receipts preserved
source_branch_cleanup.blocker_reason: cleaning the source branch would require landing or discarding retained evidence outside the completed authority-zone change set

review_waiver_refs: solo local branch-no-pr closeout requested; no PR opened

rollback_handle.instructions: Before landing, discard by switching away from chore/authority-zones-closeout and deleting the branch. After landing, revert the resulting commit.

remaining_blockers: Full cleaned/landed closeout requires hosted no-PR landing and branch cleanup, which were not attempted because unrelated retained evidence and blocked proposal receipts remain outside this completed change set.
